name: backend.ai-docs-toolkit-example
description: Minimal example/boilerplate project for backend.ai-docs-toolkit. Doubles as the test fixture for the toolkit's integration tests.

scripts.build:web: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js build:web --lang all
scripts.build:web:en: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js build:web --lang en
scripts.build:web:ko: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js build:web --lang ko
scripts.pdf: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js pdf --lang all
scripts.pdf:en: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js pdf --lang en
scripts.pdf:ko: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js pdf --lang ko
scripts.preview: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js preview --mode document --lang en
scripts.serve:web: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js serve:web --lang en
scripts.serve:web:ko: pnpm run build:toolkit && node ../backend.ai-docs-toolkit/dist/cli.js serve:web --lang ko
scripts.test: pnpm run test:pdf && pnpm run test:e2e
